title: SonicWall DHCP Server Lease Exhaustion Warnings (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall` DHCP service logs when SonicWall acts as DHCP server
spl:
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)DHCP.*pool|scope|exhaust|NACK|no free leases")
| stats count by host, scope
| sort -count
description: Branch firewalls often run DHCP for guest Wi-Fi; exhaustion looks like mysterious connectivity loss.
value: Remote sites stay ahead of pool sizing without on-site troubleshooting.
implementation: Enable DHCP server logging categories. Track pool percent used if exposed in syslog.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Branch firewalls often run DHCP for guest Wi-Fi; exhaustion looks like mysterious connectivity loss — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
